summary:
Claim: High percentages of immunized individuals lead to frequent false-positive tuberculin test results, impairing accurate diagnosis.  
Evidence: - BCG vaccination induces cross-reactive immune responses to tuberculin antigens, producing false positives. - These false positives complicate differentiation between latent TB infection and active disease.  
Answer: A
